title: EPA v. MCMILLAN BOOK
text:

Status: Closed
Outcome: Litigated With Penalty

Facilities:
  ESSELTE PENDA FLEX CORP BOORUM & PEASE, 128 SPENCER STREET, SYRACUSE, NY

Pollutants:
